title: Remove quick links & contact section, update background/colors, add warranty info

requirements.text: Remove the Quick Links section from the Footer component. Strip out the navigation links column entirely while keeping the brand info, contact details (phone, email, address), and operating hours in the footer.
acceptanceCriteria: The footer no longer contains a 'Quick Links' or navigation links column
Brand info, phone, email, address, and hours remain visible in the footer
No broken layout or empty columns appear where quick links used to be

requirements.text: Remove the Contact section (Contact.tsx) from the page entirely. Delete its usage from App.tsx so it no longer renders anywhere on the page.

quotes: end part of page contact us

acceptanceCriteria: The Contact section with phone cards and email link no longer appears on the page
No visual gap or blank area remains where the Contact section was
App.tsx no longer imports or renders the Contact component

requirements.text: Update the website's background and color scheme to use a warm golden-amber and deep charcoal palette with solar energy accents. Replace the existing OKLCH color tokens in frontend/src/index.css and tailwind.config.js to reflect this new theme — warm amber/golden tones as primary, deep charcoal/slate as background, and bright orange-yellow as accent. Apply consistently across all sections including Hero, Header, Footer, WhyChooseUs, Services, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, and BankFinanceBanner.

quotes: modify background of the website and color

acceptanceCriteria: The primary color tokens are updated to warm amber/golden tones
The background uses a deep charcoal or dark slate color instead of the previous theme
Accent and CTA buttons use a bright orange-yellow tone
All sections visually reflect the new color palette consistently
Text remains legible against new backgrounds with sufficient contrast

requirements.text: Add a Warranty & Guarantee section to the page (between WhyChooseUs and Services, or after Services) that prominently displays three warranty/guarantee items: (1) 25-Year Warranty on Solar Panels, (2) 10-Year Warranty on Inverter, (3) 5-Year Free Service Guarantee by Vendor. Use shield/badge icons for each item and style consistently with the site's updated color scheme.

quotes: Guarantee free service for 5years by vendor

acceptanceCriteria: A new Warranty & Guarantee section is visible on the page
25-Year Warranty on Solar Panels is displayed with an icon
10-Year Warranty on Inverter is displayed with an icon
5-Year Free Service Guarantee by Vendor is displayed with an icon
The section is styled consistently with the updated site color theme
The section is responsive and displays correctly on mobile and desktop

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not remove Footer entirely — only strip the Quick Links column from it
Preserve all WhatsApp CTA functionality and the FloatingWhatsAppButton
nonGoals: Changing backend data models or lead management logic
Adding new form inputs or backend integrations
